pluginDescription: Embeds external web pages or stream/video URLs into multiple TX-5DR panel positions.
globalLayoutGuideDescription:
These URLs are shared by all operators.

[Main screen]
Left content | Center content | Right extension pane

[Voice mode]
Left: above the frequency control panel
Right: the whole upper-right panel
embedNoticeDescription: Regular web pages are embedded directly. Stream URLs switch to the built-in video player automatically. Autoplay is muted by default, and some sites may still refuse embedding because of their own policy.
operatorLayoutGuideDescription:
This URL only applies to the current operator.

[Operator card]
The full card content area renders the configured page here.
operatorCardUrlDescription: Only applies to the current operator and renders inside the operator card content area.
automationPopoverUrlDescription: Global URL shown in the automation popover panel.
emptyDescription: Set a URL in this operator's plugin settings to render content here.
invalidDescription: Only http:// and https:// URLs are supported.
iframeHint: If the area stays blank or shows a refusal page, the target site is likely blocking iframe embedding with its own policy.
videoHint: Media URLs switch to a built-in player. Autoplay starts muted to maximize browser compatibility.
videoAutoplayFailed: Autoplay is ready but blocked. Click play to continue.
videoLoadFailed: Unable to load this video stream.
hlsLoadFailed: Unable to load the HLS stream.
mainRightPaneUrlLabel: Main right extension pane page URL
mainRightPaneUrlDescription: Global URL shown in the far-right extension pane of the main screen.
voiceLeftTopUrlLabel: Voice left frequency panel upper page URL
voiceLeftTopUrlDescription: Global URL shown above the frequency control panel in voice mode.
voiceRightTopUrlDescription: Global URL shown in the upper-right panel area in voice mode.
